response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified introduction segment (00:00-00:32). 2. Identified 'RENEGADE' performance (00:33-04:19) from on-screen text and verified composer 'monii' via search. 3. Identified 'アワータイムイエロー' performance (04:20-04:59) from on-screen text and verified composer 'OHTORA' via search. 4. Retrieved full lyrics for both songs. 5. Formatted as JSON according to requirements.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of two songs by the ReGLOSS VTubers group as part of the Hololive Countdown 2025-2026 event. The first song performed is 'RENEGADE' and the second is 'アワータイムイエロー'.

scenes.description: An introductory segment for the Hololive Countdown 2025-2026 performance with members of the ReGLOSS group dancing and introducing the event. No vocal singing.
The group performs the song 'RENEGADE'. Performance includes choreography and singing.
